summary: Backend email pipeline bugfix verification complete. All 11 tests pass. Verified: (1) Email diagnostic endpoint traces entire pipeline, (2) Email send to contact WITH email returns status='sent' with resend_id, (3) Email send to contact WITHOUT email returns status='failed' with descriptive error, (4) Failed email events logged in contact_events collection, (5) Conversation info endpoint returns contact data including email, (6) [EMAIL-FLOW] logging confirmed in backend logs.
critical_code_review_comments: Email diagnostic endpoint (GET /api/messages/email-diagnostic/{user_id}/{contact_id}) correctly traces: user_lookup, contact_lookup, conversation_lookup, resend_config, brand_context, and optionally send_test_email
POST /api/messages/send/{user_id} with channel='email' correctly returns status='sent' with resend_id when contact has valid email
POST /api/messages/send/{user_id} with channel='email' correctly returns status='failed' with error message when contact has no email
Failed email sends correctly log contact_events with event_type='email_failed'
GET /api/messages/conversation/{conversation_id}/info correctly returns contact info including email
[EMAIL-FLOW] logging confirmed working at every step of email pipeline (visible in backend.err.log)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email pipeline bugfix verified. Key endpoints tested: (1) GET /api/messages/email-diagnostic/{user_id}/{contact_id} - returns diagnostic with steps array showing user_lookup, contact_lookup, conversation_lookup, resend_config, brand_context. (2) POST /api/messages/send/{user_id} - email channel returns status='sent' with resend_id on success, status='failed' with error on failure. (3) GET /api/messages/conversation/{conversation_id}/info - returns contact info. (4) Contact events logged for both email_sent and email_failed at /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/events (response format: {events: [...], total: N}). Twilio SMS is MOCKED, Resend email is REAL.
mocked_api_note: Twilio SMS is MOCKED. Resend email is REAL and working.

verified: resend_config step shows API key configured
Email to contact WITH email returns status='sent'
Response includes resend_id for successful sends
Email to contact WITHOUT email returns status='failed'
email_failed events logged for failed sends
email_sent events logged for successful sends
Returns conversation data with contact info
Logs include: Starting email, Contact lookup, Resend config, Send result, Contact event logged
